description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult male pedestrian, depicted in a neutral standing pose with arms slightly extended outward. The figure is dressed in a fitted, long-sleeve jacket and matching pants, both of which appear to be casual and unadorned, with no visible fastenings or accessories. The footwear consists of sturdy, ankle-high shoes with a simple design. The facial features are defined, and the hairstyle is short and neatly combed to the side. The overall build is average, with proportional limbs and a straight posture. The surface of the figure is smooth and matte, with minimal textural detail.
description: An adult male pedestrian in a neutral standing pose, wearing a fitted jacket, matching pants, and ankle-high shoes, with short, neatly combed hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the facial features, chest, and the full front of the jacket and pants, with arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the side seam of the clothing, and the shape of the shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, jacket, and pants, as well as the back of the shoes and the extended arms.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, with similar features to the left side, including the side of the face and clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: casual fitted jacket and pants set
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended
